privacy.title: Your images never leave your device
privacy.description: All processing happens locally inside your browser. We have no servers receiving your files. No tracking. No analytics. No cookies. No accounts.

q1.a: Yes — completely free, with no limits, no watermarks, no signups.

q2.a: Entirely in your browser using the Canvas API and WebAssembly. Nothing is uploaded.

q3.a: Import: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, HEIC, HEIF, GIF, BMP, SVG, AVIF, TIFF. Export: JPG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, PDF, HEIC, BMP, GIF.

q4.q: Can I convert many files at once?
q4.a: Yes. Drop 50+ images and convert them all to the same format, then download as a ZIP.

q5.q: Does it work on iPhone HEIC photos?
q5.a: Yes. HEIC and HEIF are decoded directly in your browser.

q6.q: Do I need to install anything?
q6.a: No. FreeConvertX is a website. Open it and start converting.
